visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of two people, a male and a female, seated in an airplane cabin. The male is wearing a grey striped shirt and a white face mask, while the female wears a beige outfit and a cap. A tray of airplane food sits on the table in front of them under bright, artificial cabin lighting. (2) The scene shifts to a close-up of the male's hands as he meticulously handles food packaging. He is seen folding plastic wrappers, tying them into tight knots, and compressing juice containers to save space. He tucks the waste into the empty plastic bowls on the tray. (3) The camera shows a completed, neatly organized tray where all trash is contained and lids are secured. The male gives a thumbs up to the camera. A split-second shot of a messy tray is shown for comparison before returning to the neat one. (4) In the final phase, the male sits back in his seat, looking satisfied. He points to the clean tray and provides another thumbs-up gesture, signaling completion and satisfaction with the orderly state of his environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV：潔癖人吃飛機餐. [Subtitle]: 難道只有我會這樣？. (2) [Variety]: 垃圾打結!! 捏扁!!. (3) [Variety]: 全部收好!. (4) [Variety]: 吃完 就要這麼乾淨!. (5) [Subtitle]: 大部分人 吃完都這麼亂!. (6) [Subtitle]: 整齊乾淨 沒有疊餐碗. [Subtitle]: 這樣空服員收走時 垃圾不會亂飛亂噴，是不是很棒?!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male character, 1 female sitting next to him.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male wearing a grey horizontal-striped long-sleeve shirt and a white sanitary mask.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of an economy or premium economy class airplane cabin with grey seats and white overhead panels.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a steady, upbeat electronic BGM featuring a synthesized beat and bright melodic patterns. No vocals are present initially. A faint background hum consistent with an airplane cabin is audible. (2) A male narrator begins speaking in a friendly, clear, and informative tone. He describes the process of tidying up the tray. Intermittent rustling of plastic packaging is heard clearly over the music, indicating active handling of materials. (3) The narration continues with stable pitch and pace. The sound of a plastic lid clicking shut or being tapped against the tray occurs, followed by a slight shift in the narrator's vocal inflection to a more satisfied and concluding tone. (4) The narrator concludes with a rhetorically positive question, his voice rising slightly in pitch for emphasis. The BGM maintains its tempo until the video cut ends the track.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate a specific, conscientious habit of cleaning and organizing airplane meal trays to assist flight attendants and satisfy personal neatness standards. It appeals to both the 'oddly satisfying' aesthetic and travelers interested in etiquette.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While EVA AIR branding is visible, it appears incidental to the travel context rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses clear, Traditional Chinese subtitles and variety-show style text to emphasize actions. The production quality is high with clean audio.
